name: Kids' Flower Wall Hooks - Pillowfort™
description: Accessorize your kid's bedroom or bathroom wall with these Flower Wall Hooks from Pillowfort™. This decorative wall hook rack features a light brown woodgrain plank-style base with three flower hooks in multiple colors for hanging hats, clothing items, towels, robes and more. The wall-mount design is easy to install, and the simple design blends effortlessly with any decor styles or color palettes.
